research_question: 在保持 TopK(10)、执行语义（D0信号→D1开盘买入）、成本模型、benchmark、10-cohort full refresh 不变的前提下，仅将 holding period 从 D5 延长到 D10，是否能显著缓解当前 framework 的 primary bottleneck：execution-feasibility gap（entry limit-up + exit limit-up → delayed exit → mean reversion）？
change_detail: 框架层改动：holding period 从 D5 改为 D10（总纲 3.1 执行语义修改）。planned_exit_date = signal_date + 10 trading days。Delayed exit、terminal event、non-tradeable exit 规则与 D5 完全一致。不引入补位。不改 TopK(10)。不改 cost model。不改 benchmark。不改 signal family。

exit_semantics.delayed_exit: same as D5 (close_at_down_limit → retry next open)

layer_A_framework_feasibility.description: 验证 D10 是否显著缓解 execution-feasibility gap

layer_B_strategy_viability.description: 在 Layer A 通过后评估策略整体 viability

notes: Framework redesign: D10 holding period. This is the first round that directly addresses the execution-feasibility gap identified by Probe A (perfect foresight under tradeable constraints still produces total loss). Single candidate, single anchor signal.
